name: Splice CAD
description: Export wired cable-harness plans from KiCad to Splice CAD.
description_full:
Splice CAD is a cable-harness design tool. This plugin extracts connectors and netlist edges from your KiCad project and POSTs them to your Splice working plan in one click. Requires a (free) Splice account and an MCP API key.

Features:
- One-click "Tools -> External Plugins -> Export to Splice"
- Auto-detects connectors by reference prefix and footprint regex
- Preserves conductor edges from the netlist
- Carries KiCad part metadata for in-app catalog resolution
- Headless CLI for CI use
